from django.db import migrations, models

class TestIndexTogetherRemoval(TestCase):
    def test_index_together_removal(self):
        # Create a model with index_together and unique_together
        class MyModel(models.Model):
            name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
            age = models.IntegerField()
            bio = models.TextField()

            class Meta:
                index_together = [('name', 'age')]
                unique_together = [('name', 'bio')]

        # Create initial migration
        with self.settings(MIGRATION_MODULES={'myapp': 'migrations'}):
            call_command('makemigrations', 'myapp')

        # Apply initial migration
        call_command('migrate', 'myapp')

        # Modify model to remove index_together
        class MyModel(models.Model):
            name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
            age = models.IntegerField()
            bio = models.TextField()

            class Meta:
                unique_together = [('name', 'bio')]

        # Create migration to remove index_together
        with self.settings(MIGRATION_MODULES={'myapp': 'migrations'}):

python - <<'PY'
from django.contrib.auth.models import User
from django.contrib.contenttypes.models import ContentType
from django.contrib.admin.sites import AdminSite
from django.contrib.admin.options import ModelAdmin
from django.db import models

class MyModel(models.Model):
    data = models.JSONField()

site = AdminSite(name='admin')
admin_class = type('MyModelAdmin', (ModelAdmin,), {})
site.register(MyModel, admin_class)

user = User.objects.create_superuser(username='admin', password='password', email='admin@example.com')
content_type = ContentType.objects.get_for_model(MyModel)
obj = MyModel(data={"foo": "bar"})
obj.save()
site.login(user)
response = site._build_app_index(request=user, model_admin=admin_class(content_type.model_class(), site))
print(response.content.decode())
PY
